title: CommandExecutedPayload
description: Payload for command_executed events: logged after the EV3 finishes executing a command

command.description: Name of the command that was executed

success.description: Whether the command completed without error

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock time in milliseconds from receipt to completion

error_message.description: Human-readable error description when success is false

params.description: Resolved command parameters used during execution

controller_type.description: Input source that generated the original command
